positive: A minimalist, stylized illustration of a friendly, majestic mountain owl perched on a branch, surrounded by geometric constellations and subtly blooming stylized flora. The owl should have clean, strong silhouettes and expressive, gentle eyes. Use a color palette of deep indigo, forest emerald, muted gold, and creamy bone white. Composition should be highly symmetrical and centralized, perfect for a circular or square apparel print. Style must be modern botanical linocut mixed with celestial art, featuring clean lines, negative space, and strong contrast. Studio lighting, high detail, vector art quality, suitable for silk screening.
negative: blur, low detail, grainy, watermark, signature, text, noise, messy, bad anatomy, distorted, artifacts, extra limbs, bad silhouette, photorealism, logos, copyrighted characters
